title: Auto Repair Kits
description: Automatically repair equipped items with rechargable Repair Kits!
body:
Craft and upgrade Repair Kits, recharge them with various materials and enjoy having your gear be automatically repaired!


Notes:
- Comes with Curios compatibility!
- Configure how many charges the kits have and what materials can charge them
- The repair kit spends same amount of charges as the durability it repairs

Usage Guide:

- Craft a repair kit
- Read the tooltip to find out what items can recharge it
- Click the kit with those items
- Now that the kit is charged, leave it in your inventory
- it will now automatically repair your items until the kit runs out of charges (you can notice this because the kit's durability bar shows how much charges are left % wise
